mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, title, objective, scope, acceptance_criteria, verification_commands, status, assigned_to, delegated_by, completion_summary, verification_verdict, verification_report FROM project_tasks WHERE project_id = #{project_id} AND id = #{id}

SELECT id, project_id, title, objective, scope, acceptance_criteria, verification_commands, status, assigned_to, delegated_by, completion_summary, verification_verdict, verification_report FROM project_tasks WHERE project_id = #{project_id} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{from}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_tasks( project_id, title, objective, scope, acceptance_criteria, verification_commands, status, assigned_to, delegated_by, completion_summary, verification_verdict, verification_report ) VALUES ( #{project_id}, #{description.title}, #{description.objective}, #{description.scope}, #{description.acceptanceCriteria, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.teamai.mybatis.typehandler.StringListJsonHandler}, #{description.verificationCommands, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.teamai.mybatis.typehandler.StringListJsonHandler}, #{description.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description.assignedTo, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, #{description.delegatedBy, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, #{description.completionSummary}, #{description.verificationVerdict, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description.verificationReport} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, title, objective, scope, acceptance_criteria, verification_commands, status, assigned_to, delegated_by, completion_summary, verification_verdict, verification_report FROM project_tasks WHERE project_id = #{project_id} AND delegate_request_id = #{delegate_request_id}

SELECT id, project_id, title, objective, scope, acceptance_criteria, verification_commands, status, assigned_to, delegated_by, completion_summary, verification_verdict, verification_report FROM project_tasks WHERE project_id = #{project_id} AND approve_request_id = #{approve_request_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE project_tasks SET assigned_to = #{agent, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, completion_summary = #{report.summary}, verification_verdict = CASE WHEN #{report.success} THEN 'APPROVED' ELSE 'NOT_APPROVED' END, verification_report = #{report.verificationReport}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE project_id = #{project_id} AND id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM project_tasks WHERE project_id = #{project_id}
